title: WakeUp-Jin/Practical-Guide-to-Context-Engineering

title: ThibautMelen/agentic-ai-systems

title: bytedance/deer-flow
description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

title: Claude Code v2.1.207｜Auto mode がクラウド3社で opt-in 不要に｜毎日Changelog解説
AIエージェントを"暴走"させない仕組み ― ドキュメントを憲法にしたら、コードより先にルールが育った話
月額0円の会計ソフトに、AIチャットを載せた【WebMCP対応・ローカルLLM/クラウドLLM】
Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Web Searchを日本語で試して分かった、得意な検索と苦手な検索
AIエージェントを「統計解析ツール」として使う：Mood Tracker MCPによる感情データのパターン抽出
The Context Access Divide: Interaction-Level Architecture as a Complementary Dimension of Agentic Inequality
description: Sharp et al. (2025) introduce "agentic inequality" as a framework for analyzing disparities in access to AI agents across three dimensions: availability, quality, and quantity. These person- and organization-level dimensions characterize who can access agents and at what capability, but do not address a structurally important divide operating at a finer level: the individual interaction. Two users
